GOVERNMENT ADMINISTRATION COUNCIL APPROVES PERSONNEL CHANGES Peiping, NCNA, in Chinese Numeral Code to the Press, 14 Jan 52, 0745 GMT Peiping, 14 January -- Various appointments and removals approved at the 116th session of the Government Administration Council are as follows: A.    Officials of Chahar People's Government Chang Hsien-chin (Jk A( /t ), chief, Public Security Office; formerly deputy chief, Public Security Office, Chahar People's Government Ting I-Hu
